prompt: The repo audit CLI hangs forever on big repos. ps shows the checker child process still alive but doing nothing, parent doing nothing, both just sitting there until someone ctrl-C's the pipeline job. Small toy repos audit fine every time, which is what makes it so annoying to reproduce locally — you only see it once a checker produces a serious amount of output. It is not one specific checker either; ANY sufficiently chatty tool wedges it. The runner is toolrunner.py and python3 test_toolrunner.py reproduces the hang reliably (the test bounds it so it fails instead of blocking your terminal). Fix the runner; the test file is not to be edited.
